subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-11 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: It is the season of festivities, yet We remain bereft of the vision of Our Beloved; whilst the world exulteth in pleasure and delight, Our eyes are filled with tears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: موسم عید است و ما نومید از دیدار یار       عالمی در عیش و نوش و ما بچشم اشکبار
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @universal peace; world unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
